column1: Hey Jillian, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you! which destination were you lookin to book
Nassau is dope for sure. how many ppl in your group?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
Oh dope we have a couple groups from Bama rollin with us this year, y'all def know how to party lol
Wait one is flying in from phenoix I forgot
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
word! I'll send what we have rn at the moment just keep in mind things may look different in 2 weeks with pricing, availability, etc
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if it came through
I sent without flights first, only cause its a lot cheaper for you to get flights separately on your own. thatll help you stay within the budget you mentioned in the email
I added Punta Cana in there too as a slightly more affordable alternative
heyy Jillian whats up, did you get to check out that email?
Hey I did they said it's expensive I'm trying to look for Cabo but it'll be the same price I feel
Cabo is even more expensive yea. Punta Cana and Cancun are def more affordable if you want to look at those
hey did you wanna check out punta / cancun? def more affordable
Hey! Can I just see the price for Cabo?
heyy checkin in, how we feelin about those options?
I think the 4 nights is good for Cabo
okay bet. I think we only have a few rooms left for your week. or the 14-18
did you want to lock it in
Yes I will lyk what they're thinking soon
I think we're gonna book it tomorrow
Yes! The price won't go up by the morning right?
I'll double check to make sure pricing is still the same! you can use that link tomorrow tho yea
okay bet. ill email everything in the morning if thats cool
I just emailed over the reservation. pricing is that same $650 per person. let me know if you need any help navigating the booking portal
the email says 850 for 4 people is that true? Or 650?
650, typo on my end in the email body. if you click into the reservation you'll see 650 on the four slots
hey how things lookin were y'all able to get on the reservation?
Yes!! One just needs to wait for her mom I guess till tomorrow
oh bet! she's waiting to find out if she can go? may be best for the rest of you to start getting situated while we have things avail
heyy did your friend here back from her mom yet?
Yes we are booking today everyone was so busy for the holidays
Bet all good, I'll refresh the reservation
Hey sorry it is so late it's saying my spot is temporary reserved
Hey morning, is it still saying that? Are you logged into your portal
Hey! One of my friends asked if she can't go and cancels before the second deadline would she still be charged 450?
hey so we dont hold peoples cards on file, so unless she makes the payment theres no way for her to be charged
yoo Jill, theres one more person joining the group right? we have 3 of you slotted in rn
Yes she's just waiting on money
okay word, when will she know by? ops team is tryna get you all locked in and submitted
hey! Is everything going to be okay for us to go to Mexico still ?

hey at the moment hotels and airlines are still operating as normal! The stuff going around is tied to other parts of Mexico, not the Cancun hotel zone where our resorts are. Cancun tourism areas are heavily secured
We're doing Cabo is that still okay
if anything changes, like a US government travel ban, we'd notify everyone and outline next steps
Is there still insurance I can buy in case ?
you may be outside the window to add this insurance in particular, but heres the link. there are also other options out there you can find https://www.travelinsured.com/agency/
Does this insurance cover the whole650?
I just want to make sure before I purchase it
hey, it'll cover your entire trip purchase. as far as what you get refunded, that will be determined by Travel Insured based on your coverage and nature of your claim
So even if I add the flight and I didn't cover it through delta it'll cover it?
My parents are asking if you know the specific terms of coverage

Im sorry wish I had a better answer but Im not too sure since we arent the direct company that issues the coverage. I would check in with Travel Insured directly, they can better assist you with coverage terms. I dont to give you in inaccurate answer
You can call claims directly at 800-243-2440
hey Jillian, we just need your flight info uploaded so that we can set up your airport transportation. you and erin
Erin isn't coming anymore and I am on Tylar's flight
hey what time is the shuttle tomorrow ?
Hey I'll reach out to the ops team and get that for you
